title: Tech-house single release campaign — NIGHTSHIFT FX cover + colour-splash promos + vectorized logo + merch cards

steps.note: Cover hero frame press_01 — DJ NIGHTSHIFT under the magenta neon diamond sign; source for the duotone cover + magenta colour-splash.
Promo portrait press_06 — moody neon DJ portrait, second colour-splash candidate.
NIGHTSHIFT wordmark bitmap (black on transparent) to vectorize into the monochrome lockup.
Client Catch&Release-style cover reference — halftone + chromatic glitch + grain aesthetic anchor.

Uploaded the 3 connector inputs (cover/promo hero, NIGHTSHIFT logo, club cover reference) to Adobe CC; presigned URLs head every downstream chain. CSV + 12 ticket QR PNGs stay local (data-merge is [T]).
Searched Adobe Stock (StockAsset/Photo) for the film-grain / neon-bokeh texture plate that informs the cover grain wash + merch backdrop accent.

params.query: film grain overlay neon bokeh magenta cyan club texture
params.chosen: 327625971 grained scratched film texture 5000x4000; bokeh alt 490427956

steps.note: Licensed + downloaded the grain/scratch Stock plate (license-before-edit) — the film-grain aesthetic reference for the cover (step 17) and merch backdrop accent.
PROMO CHAIN — masked the DJ NIGHTSHIFT in the hero frame (white=subject) so the depth-grade keeps her sharp and the colour-splash can isolate the neon.
Lens-blurred the club frame to push the crowd/decks background into bokeh depth behind the artist for the moody club look.
Dropped the whole frame to a moody low-key club exposure (exposure -0.9, gamma 0.82) for the deep-night mood.
Crushed the blacks (+38) for the deep shadow floor of the club mood.
Pushed the magenta neon brand hue (sat +28, slight hue rotate) across the frame; cyan deck glow already strong — this is the finished moody-club depth grade.
COLOUR-SPLASH — masked the glowing magenta neon diamond sign (prompt) to isolate the single brand accent kept in colour; tubes traced cleanly.
Boosted ONLY magenta (+60) inside the accent mask — the colour kept vivid in the splash.
Inverted the accent mask so everything EXCEPT the magenta neon is selected for the duotone.
Duotoned everything outside the accent (hue 290 low-sat) — finished selective-colour promo: vivid magenta neon pops on a mono club frame. DELIVERABLE: colour-splash promo.
COVER CHAIN — full-frame magenta/black duotone (hue 327 = brand Nightshift Magenta) of the hero frame to set the cover base treatment.
Ben-Day dot halftone screen (radius 8) over the duotone for the print-zine aesthetic.
Brand-magenta wash (#FF1E8C) on MULTIPLY to unify the halftone with the Nightshift palette.
Film-grain finish (amount 55, aesthetic informed by the licensed Stock grain plate from step 4) — FINISHED FX streaming cover base.
ALT COLOURWAY — chromatic-aberration VHS glitch (offset -24) on a copy of the finished FX cover for the visualiser/announce loop.
Added analog VHS noise (28%) over the glitch — FINISHED VHS-glitch alt colourway. DELIVERABLE: glitch alt cover.

Recommended a tech-house display face for the cover title + merch card type. Chosen: Comba-BoldUltraWide (bold ultra-wide industrial); corroborated by Centrifuge-Bold / Strelka-Ultra. Its PostScript name = the data-merge fallBackFont; local merge falls back to Futura Condensed-XBold (Comba not installed on the render host).
Vectorized the NIGHTSHIFT logo bitmap to a scalable SVG (840 vector paths) for cover + merch use.

Render of the vectorized logo to print-clean PNG/PDF. document_render_vector [C] rejected raw SVG (needs a PDF/.ai source) and headless .ai authoring is unavailable, so the print-clean lockup was rendered LOCALLY from the genuine connector SVG: kept the 10 black wordmark paths, dropped 830 light anti-alias artifacts, rebuilt transparent black/magenta/white lockups (2714x966) + a 300dpi print PDF.
Licensed a 2nd Stock plate (pink bokeh 490427956) as the neon-bokeh merch backdrop accent behind the duotone band on the sticker cards.

data-merge rendered locally from input_assets/tour_dates.csv (12 rows); the document_merge_data_vector connector requires a human-authored Illustrator-Variables template. Each card binds city/venue/date/doors_time/support_act + the per-row ticket_qr Linked-File (matched by city slug), with the vectorized NIGHTSHIFT lockup, magenta-on-black bokeh duotone band, cyan keyline, hairline rule + crop marks. All copy read programmatically from the CSV.

Rendered the 12 merged cards to a 12-page print PDF (A6+bleed @300dpi) + a 3x4 proof contact sheet. Mirrors document_render_vector of the merged .ai. Snapped card 02 (Berlin) as 2nd of the 2-3 visible data-merge samples.
3rd data-merge sample snapped (Amsterdam) + the full 12-up proof sheet for the audit gallery.
MERCH STICKER — masked the artist on the colour-splash promo (reused as die-cut sticker art).
Inverted the subject mask so the background is selected for the solid fill.

Filled the inverted background with club-black (#0A0A0F) — canonical select->invert->fill backdrop recipe → clean die-cut sticker with the magenta-splash artist popping. DELIVERABLE: merch sticker variant.

Cropped/resized the finished FX cover to 1600x1600 (streaming + square announce). Source was already 1:1 so this was a clean resize-only (no subject clip). The 1600px cover is resampled from the 1024px connector master (web/streaming spec, not print).

Attempted a 9:16 story reframe of the cover; connector returned a pad result (576x1024) and recommended image_generative_expand (unavailable in this env). Story is therefore composed LOCALLY as a branded 1080x1920 layout (full cover + lockup + magenta bands) rather than a clipped/AI-expanded crop.

Built a COHESIVE moody-club PROMO SET: connector colour-splash hero is the flagship; 3 more press frames (portrait-neon, backlit-haze, smoke-lights) got the same grade recipe applied locally (low-key exposure, crushed blacks, neon magenta/cyan push, light grain) so the deliverable is a genuine consistent set.

Composited the NIGHTSHIFT lockup + brand type onto the 1600x1600 streaming cover (legibility scrim, NEW SINGLE OUT NOW in brand magenta). Square announce = clean 1600 master. Glitch alt resized to 1600.

Composed the 1080x1920 STORY social crop as a branded layout (full FX cover + centered lockup + tagline + magenta-banded CTA) since the 9:16 connector crop needed unavailable generative-expand. Fixed a centered-lockup clip before export.

Self-verify: asserted all output dims (covers 1600x1600, story 1080x1920, sticker 1600x1600, 12 merch cards 1819x1311=A6+bleed@300dpi, print PDF=12 pages). Read back the 3 most complex finals (streaming cover, 1080x1920 story, 12-up proof sheet + Budapest card) — no clipped type/collisions/palette drift/garbles. Fixed one centered-lockup clip in the story before export. QR->city mapping 12/12 correct.
